name: rpg-marketplace
description: Claude Code plugin marketplace for RPG campaigns.

plugins.name: rpg-vault-guardian
plugins.description: Obsidian vault integrity guardian for RPG campaigns.

plugins.name: rpg-loremaster
plugins.description: Build dark-leaning PF2e campaigns end to end: campaign spine, regions/nations, cities, factions, locations, NPCs, artifacts/relics, image-gen prompts + a campaign visual style bible, battlemap prompts + an executable Dungeondraft battlemap-file generator, music-gen prompts + a campaign audio style bible, clue maps, and an interactive conductor + a consistency-reviewer subagent.

plugins.name: rpg-gamemaster
plugins.description: Session prep and run layer for PF2e campaigns — session zero / party builder, runnable sessions, fronts and clocks, balanced encounters, non-combat challenges (Victory Points), itemized treasure + wealth-by-level tracking, a GM run sheet, and a post-session recap that reconciles what happened against the vault (quest status, events, clue reveals) with GM adjudication on any divergence.

plugins.name: rpg-foundry-forge
plugins.description: Compile a validated RPG vault into a playable Foundry VTT session via the foundry-vtt-mcp server — scenes and lighting, scene soundtracks (playlists + ambience + ambient sound, per-track mixer channels), creature actors with token placement, quest/lore/dashboard journals (optional Paizo theme), player ownership, encounters, non-combat challenges (challenge journal + live rolls + VP clock), and party-wealth sync (read player inventories back, reconcile, push loot to sheets); per-artifact QA via a pre-write scene stress-tester and a post-write journal verifier; idempotent and resumable via an on-disk build manifest.
